RegraTarifaria.Regra:
50.RULE APPLICATION AND OTHER CONDITIONS: NOTE - THE FOLLOWING TEXT IS INFORMATIONAL AND NOT
VALIDATED FOR AUTOPRICING.
LIGHT FARE
01.ELIGIBILITY: NO ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS APPLY.
02.DAY/TIME: PERMITTED NOON TO MIDNIGHT MON OR TUE/WED/THU/SAT OR
1201AM TO NOON FRI OR 1201AM TO 1000AM SUN.
03.SEASONALITY: NO SEASONAL TRAVEL RESTRICTIONS APPLY.
04.FLIGHT APPLICATION: THE FARE COMPONENT MUST NOT BE ON
ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING
ANY G3 FLIGHT OPERATED BY G3
IN COMBINATION WITH
ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING
ANY G3 FLIGHT OPERATED BY G3.
AND
THE FARE COMPONENT MUST BE ON
ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING
ANY G3 FLIGHT OPERATED BY G3.
05.ADVANCE RESERVATIONS/TICKETING: RESERVATIONS FOR EACH SECTOR ON THE FARE COMPONENT ARE
REQUIRED AT LEAST 28 DAYS BEFORE DEPARTURE FROM FARE
COMPONENT ORIGIN.
STANDBY NOT PERMITTED.
06.MINIMUM STAY: TRAVEL FROM TURNAROUND MUST COMMENCE NO EARLIER THAN 2
HOURS AFTER ARRIVAL AT THE TURNAROUND.
07.MAXIMUM STAY: TRAVEL FROM LAST STOPOVER MUST COMMENCE NO LATER THAN
365 DAYS AFTER TICKET ISSUANCE.
08.STOPOVERS: IF TRAVEL FROM TURNAROUND MUST COMMENCE NO EARLIER
THAN 481 MINUTES AFTER ARRIVAL AT THE TURNAROUND.
1 FREE STOPOVER PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT
1 IN GRU
1 IN CGH
1 IN VCP.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES HOWEVER A
STOPOVER MAY NOT EXCEED 5 DAYS.
OR - 1 FREE STOPOVER PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT
1 IN GIG
1 IN SDU
1 IN BSB.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES HOWEVER A
STOPOVER MAY NOT EXCEED 3 DAYS.
OR - NO STOPOVERS PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES.
IF TRAVEL FROM TURNAROUND COMMENCES NO LATER THAN 480
MINUTES AFTER ARRIVAL AT TURNAROUND.
NO STOPOVERS PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES.
1 FREE STOPOVER PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT
1 IN GRU
1 IN CGH
1 IN VCP.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES HOWEVER A
STOPOVER MAY NOT EXCEED 5 DAYS.
OR - 1 FREE STOPOVER PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT
1 IN GIG
1 IN SDU
1 IN BSB.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES HOWEVER A
STOPOVER MAY NOT EXCEED 3 DAYS.
OR - NO STOPOVERS PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT.
NO STOPOVER OCCURS IF PASSENGER TAKES NEXT
AVAILABLE FLIGHT WITHIN 480 MINUTES.
09.TRANSFERS: UNLIMITED TRANSFERS PERMITTED IN EACH DIRECTION.
AT CONNECTIONS NONE PERMITTED IN EACH
DIRECTION
AT STOPOVERS IN GRU AIRPORT/CGH IN EACH
DIRECTION/IN VCP AIRPORT/BSB IN EACH
DIRECTION/IN GIG AIRPORT/SDU IN EACH
DIRECTION.
FARE BREAK AND EMBEDDED SURFACE SECTORS NOT PERMITTED
ON THE FARE COMPONENT.
10.COMBINATIONS: CIRCLE TRIPS NOT PERMITTED.
ROUND TRIPS
FARES MAY BE COMBINED ON A HALF ROUND TRIP BASIS
-TO FORM ROUND TRIPS.
PROVIDED -
COMBINATIONS ARE WITH ANY FARE FOR CARRIER G3 IN
ANY RULE AND TARIFF.
OPEN JAWS
FARES MAY BE COMBINED ON A HALF ROUND TRIP BASIS
-TO FORM SINGLE OR DOUBLE OPEN JAWS
A MAXIMUM OF 2 FARE COMPONENTS PERMITTED.
PROVIDED -
COMBINATIONS ARE WITH ANY FARE FOR CARRIER G3
WITHIN BRAZIL IN ANY RULE AND TARIFF.
TRAVEL FROM TURNAROUND MUST COMMENCE NO EARLIER
THAN 481 MINUTES AFTER ARRIVAL AT THE TURNAROUND.
END-ON-END
END-ON-END COMBINATIONS NOT PERMITTED. VALIDATE ALL
FARE COMPONENTS. SIDE TRIPS NOT PERMITTED.
11.BLACKOUT DATES: NO BLACKOUT DATES APPLY.
12.SURCHARGES: THE PROVISIONS BELOW APPLY ONLY AS FOLLOWS -FARES MAY
ONLY BE SOLD BY G3.
OR - WHEN TICKETS ARE SOLD IN COLOMBIA.
OR - IF INFANT WITHOUT A SEAT PSGR UNDER 2.
THERE IS NO MISCELLANEOUS/OTHER SURCHARGE PER COUPON
PER ANY PASSENGER.
OTHERWISE
MISCELLANEOUS/OTHER SURCHARGE OF USD 5.00 PER COUPON
WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE PER ANY
PASSENGER.
13.ACCOMPANIED TRAVEL: ACCOMPANIED TRAVEL NOT REQUIRED.
14.TRAVEL RESTRICTIONS: VALID FOR TRAVEL COMMENCING ON EACH TRIP ON/AFTER
14MAY26 AND ON/BEFORE 30SEP26.
15.SALES RESTRICTIONS: FOOTNOTE RULE
TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON/BEFORE 18MAY26.
FARE RULE
FARES MAY ONLY BE SOLD BY G3 AND MAY NOT BE SOLD BY
TRAVEL AGENTS.
TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD IN BRAZIL.
OR - TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD BY TRAVEL AGENT 1XH9.
16.PENALTIES: CHANGES
CHARGE BRL 475.00/USD 100.00 OR 100 PERCENT
WHICHEVER IS LOWER.
NOTE - TEXT BELOW NOT VALIDATED FOR AUTOPRICING.
FOR CHANGES BEFORE ORIGINAL SCHEDULED FLIGHT
DEPARTURE.
CHARGE 100 PERCENT FOR NO-SHOW.
NOTE - TEXT BELOW NOT VALIDATED FOR AUTOPRICING.
FOR CHANGES AFTER ORIGINAL SCHEDULED FLIGHT
DEPARTURE /NO-SHOW/.
PASSENGER IS CONSIDERED A NO-SHOW IF HE/SHE FAILS
TO CANCEL THE BOOKING AND REISSUE THE TICKET
BEFORE ORIGINAL SCHEDULED FLIGHT DEPARTURE AS
SHOWN ON THE E-TICKET.
---------------------------------------------
CHANGE IS A ROUTING/DATE/FLIGHT MODIFICATION.
CHANGE IS PERMITTED WITHIN TICKET VALIDITY.
TICKETS MUST BE REISSUED FOR ANY VOLUNTARY
CHANGES. TICKET MUST BE REPRICED KEEPING THE
ORIGINAL TICKETED FARES AND RULE PROVISIONS FOR
ALL FLOWN AND/OR UNCHANGED FARE COMPONENTS.
ANY CHANGED FARE COMPONENT MUST BE REPRICED USING
CURRENT FARES AND RULE PROVISIONS IN EFFECT AT
THE MOMENT OF TICKET REISSUE.
IF THE NEW ITINERARY RESULTS IN HIGHER FARE - THE
FARE DIFFERENCE RESULTING FROM THE CALCULATION
BETWEEN THE FARE OF THE ORIGINAL ITINERARY AND
THE FARE OF THE NEW ITINERARY MUST BE ADD
COLLECTED ALONG WITH THE APPLICABLE PENALTY FEES.
TICKET MUST BE REISSUED AT THE SAME TIME AS
FLIGHT CHANGE.
---------------------------------------------
PENALTY FEES MUST BE COLLECTED PER CHANGED
FARE COMPONENT. WHEN THIS FARE IS COMBINED WITH
ANOTHER FARE THEN THE PENALTY FEES MUST BE
COLLECTED PER CHANGED FARE COMPONENT ACCORDING TO
EACH RESPECTIVE FARE RULE CONDITIONS.
PENALTY FEES MUST BE COLLECTED PER PASSENGER.
PENALTY FEES DO NOT APPLY TO INFANTS NOT
OCCUPYING A SEAT.
CHILDREN DISCOUNTS DO NOT APPLY ON THE PENALTY
FEE. CHILDREN PAY THE ADULT PENALTY FEE.
FOR TICKETS REISSUED THROUGH BSP/ARC TRAVEL
AGENCIES - PENALTY FEES MUST BE COLLECTED
VIA -YR- TAX CODE IN THE E-TICKET TAX FIELD.
CANCELLATIONS
ANY TIME
CHARGE 100 PERCENT
NOTE - TEXT BELOW NOT VALIDATED FOR AUTOPRICING.
PENALTY FEES MUST BE COLLECTED PER CANCELED
FARE COMPONENT. WHEN THIS FARE IS COMBINED
WITH ANOTHER FARE THEN THE PENALTY FEES MUST
BE COLLECTED PER CANCELED FARE COMPONENT
ACCORDING TO EACH RESPECTIVE FARE RULE
CONDITIONS.
PENALTY FEES MUST BE COLLECTED PER PASSENGER.
17.HIP/MILEAGE EXCEPTIONS: NO HIP OR MILEAGE EXCEPTIONS APPLY.
18.TICKET ENDORSEMENTS: THE ORIGINAL AND THE REISSUED TICKET MUST BE ANNOTATED
- NONEND/NONTRANS/ - IN THE ENDORSEMENT BOX.
19.CHILDREN DISCOUNTS: CNN/ACCOMPANIED CHILD PSGR 2-11 - CHARGE 100 PERCENT
OF THE FARE.
MUST BE ACCOMPANIED ON ALL FLIGHTS IN THE SAME
COMPARTMENT BY ADULT PSGR 12 OR OLDER.
OR - UNN/UNACCOMPANIED CHILD PSGR 8-11 - CHARGE 100
PERCENT OF THE FARE.
OR - INF/INFANT WITHOUT A SEAT PSGR UNDER 2 - NO
CHARGE.
MUST BE ACCOMPANIED ON ALL FLIGHTS IN THE SAME
COMPARTMENT BY ADULT PSGR 12 OR OLDER.
NOTE - TEXT BELOW NOT VALIDATED FOR AUTOPRICING.
NAO SERA PERMITIDO O EMBARQUE DE CRIANCAS MENORES
DE 5 ANOS DESACOMPANHADAS.
20.TOUR CONDUCTOR DISCOUNTS: NO DISCOUNTS FOR TOUR CONDUCTORS.
21.AGENT DISCOUNTS: NO DISCOUNTS FOR SALE AGENTS.
22.ALL OTHER DISCOUNTS: IF DISABLED PASSENGER ASSISTANT WITH ID.
AND - THE PROVISIONS BELOW APPLY ONLY AS FOLLOWS -
TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD BY CRS/CXR DEPT SAORS/
SAOCC/SAOB2/VVICC/BOGCC.
PCP/PCP PSGR - CHARGE 20 PERCENT OF THE FARE.
TICKET DESIGNATOR - DP80.
23.MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS: THIS FARE MUST NOT BE USED AS THROUGH FARE WITH A
DIFFERENTIAL AND/OR TO CALCULATE DIFFERENTIAL.
25.FARE BY RULE: NOT APPLICABLE.
26.GROUPS: NO GROUP PROVISIONS APPLY.
27.TOURS: NO TOUR PROVISIONS APPLY.
28.VISIT ANOTHER COUNTRY: NO VISIT ANOTHER COUNTRY PROVISIONS APPLY.
29.DEPOSITS: NO DEPOSIT PROVISIONS APPLY.
31.VOLUNTARY CHANGES: ENTER RD*31 OR RDLINE NUM*31 FOR VOLUNTARY CHGS.
33.VOLUNTARY REFUNDS: THE PROVISIONS BELOW APPLY ONLY AS FOLLOWS -
WHEN TICKETS ARE SOLD IN COLOMBIA.
AND - TICKETING FOR DEPARTURE OF JOURNEY ORIGIN MUST BE
COMPLETED AT LEAST 7 DAYS BEFORE DEPARTURE.
OPEN RETURNS PERMITTED.
IN THE EVENT OF REFUND TO TICKETED FLIGHTS BELOW
PROVISIONS APPLY:
FARE IS FULLY REFUNDABLE WITHIN 7 DAYS AFTER THE
RESERVATION DATES PROVIDED ALL RESERVATIONS AND
TICKETING OCCUR ON THE SAME DATE.
REFUND MUST BE REQUESTED BEFORE DEPARTURE OF
JOURNEY.
REFUND IS REQUIRED SAME DAY OR BEFORE ORIGINALLY
SCHEDULED FLIGHT OF FIRST UNUSED TICKET COUPON.
REFUND MUST BE MADE PRIOR TO 12 MONTHS AFTER TICKET
ISSUE DATE.
NO CHARGE.
IF ALL PENALTIES IN PRICING UNIT ARE PER PRICING
UNIT COLLECT HIGHEST.
NO DISCOUNTS TO FEES APPLY.
REPRICING CONDITIONS:
1. FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS FARE BREAK
POINTS MAY NOT BE CHANGED. FOR PARTIALLY FLOWN
FARE COMPONENTS ONLY DESTINATION FARE BREAK
POINTS MAY BE CHANGED
2. NEW FARE FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENT MUST
BE EQUAL TO OR HIGHER THAN TICKETED FARE
3. RBD OF THE REPLACING FARE MUST BE EQUAL OR
HIGHER THAN RBD OF THE PREVIOUS FARE
ONLY VALIDATING CARRIER MAY REFUND TICKET.
REFUND VIA ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT.
OR -
REFUND MUST BE MADE PRIOR TO 12 MONTHS AFTER TICKET
ISSUE DATE.
CHARGE 99.9999% OF THE FARE PER FARE COMPONENT.
IF ALL PENALTIES IN PRICING UNIT ARE PER FARE
COMPONENT COLLECT EACH.
IF MIX OF PER FARE COMPONENT AND PER PRICING UNIT
CALCULATE EACH AS SPECIFIED AND COLLECT HIGHEST.
NO DISCOUNTS TO FEES APPLY.

IC.INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUCTION: NOT A CONSTRUCTED FARE
